title: LinkedIn SalesNav Scraper v2
description: Paste your Sales Navigator URL. Uses Voyager JSON API (with HTML fallback) to find companies.

salesNavUrl.title: Sales Navigator Search URL
salesNavUrl.description: Full URL from your Sales Navigator company search.

keywordsOverride.title: Keywords override (optional)
keywordsOverride.description: Force specific keywords instead of those decoded from the URL.

maxCompanies.title: Max companies to scrape
maxCompanies.description: Keep under 50 for free tier stability.

maxSearchPages.title: Max search pages
maxSearchPages.description: Voyager API returns 10 results/page. 5 pages = up to 50 companies.

requestDelayMs.title: Base delay between requests (ms)
requestDelayMs.description: Higher = safer. Use 8000-12000ms if you hit auth walls or 429s.

deepScrape.title: Deep scrape /about/ page
deepScrape.description: Fetch each company's About page for website, specialties, founded date etc.

useApifyProxy.title: Use Apify Proxy
useApifyProxy.description: Keep enabled. Free tier uses Datacenter proxies. Residential (paid) works much better for LinkedIn.

proxyCountryCode.title: Proxy Country Code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2)
proxyCountryCode.description: IMPORTANT: Match to your target region. IN=India, US=USA, GB=UK, SG=Singapore, DE=Germany.
